title: Apple delivers a nearly perfect quarter, with a CEO change and an AI update ahead
summary: Apple reported its best March quarter in company history, driving a 4% after-hours stock jump amid strong iPhone and Mac demand. The strong results come as the company prepares for CEO succession and anticipated AI announcements. The quarter demonstrates Apple's continued market strength despite leadership transition.
content: In fact, it was the best March quarter in company history, and Apple stock jumped 4% in after-hours trading.

zh.title: 苹果交出近乎完美的季度成绩，CEO即将更换和AI更新在即
zh.summary: 苹果报告了公司历史上最好的3月季度，在iPhone和Mac需求强劲的推动下，盘后股价上涨4%。强劲的业绩是在公司准备CEO交接班和期待AI公告的背景下出现的。该季度证明尽管经历领导层过渡，苹果的市场力量依然强劲。

title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 closed April above 7,200 for the first time, marking its strongest monthly performance since 2020 as stocks ended the month on a high note. The rally reflects investor optimism heading into May trading. Market momentum suggests positive sentiment entering the new trading period.
content: Stocks ended April's trading on a high note, with the S&P 500 closing above 7,200 for the first time and posting its strongly monthly performance since 2020.

zh.title: 周五的大股票新闻：下个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数4月首次收盘突破7200点，创下自2020年以来最强劲的月度表现，股市以高潮结束本月。上涨反映了投资者对进入5月交易的乐观态度。市场动力表明市场进入新交易时期时情绪积极。

title: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
summary: AI-powered opinion polling offers cost and speed advantages over traditional survey methods, raising questions about whether it can deliver greater accuracy. The technology enables faster data collection but accuracy depends on methodology and data quality. The shift toward AI polling could reshape how public opinion is measured.
content: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?

zh.title: AI会导致更准确的民意调查吗？
zh.summary: 基于AI的民意调查相比传统调查方法具有成本和速度优势，但其是否能提供更高的准确性仍有疑问。该技术能够加快数据收集，但准确性取决于方法论和数据质量。向AI民意调查的转变可能会重塑公众舆论的测量方式。

title: Fertiliser boss says war puts 10 billion meals a week at risk
summary: Yara's CEO warned that fertilizer shortages stemming from the Iran conflict threaten food security for roughly 10 billion weekly meals globally. The shortage could reduce crop yields and inflate food prices, creating serious supply chain implications. The warning highlights how geopolitical events can cascade through agricultural systems.
content: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

zh.title: 化肥企业高管警告战争威胁每周10亿顿餐食安全
zh.summary: Yara首席执行官警告说，伊朗冲突导致的化肥短缺威胁全球每周约10亿顿餐的粮食安全。短缺可能会降低作物产量并推高食品价格，造成严重的供应链影响。这一警告凸显了地缘政治事件如何在农业系统中引发连锁反应。

title: Alphabet hits a milestone as it closes in on Nvidia
summary: Alphabet added a record $421 billion to its market capitalization as cloud growth and AI momentum propelled shares higher. The surge reflects investor confidence in Google's cloud services and artificial intelligence prospects. Alphabet is narrowing the gap with Nvidia in market valuation.
content: Alphabet added a record $421 billion to its market cap as massive cloud growth and AI momentum sent shares soaring.

zh.title: Alphabet达成里程碑，市值逼近英伟达
zh.summary: 随着云服务增长和人工智能势头推动股价上升，Alphabet的市值增加了创纪录的4210亿美元。这一激增反映了投资者对谷歌云服务和人工智能前景的信心。Alphabet正在缩小与英伟达的市值差距。

title: 'There were letters I didn't want to open': Rise in unpaid debt court cases
summary: County court judgements for unpaid debt surged 17.5% in the first quarter of 2026 compared to the same period last year, signaling rising financial stress among consumers. The increase reflects broader economic pressures affecting household finances. The trend highlights growing consumer insolvency challenges.
content: The number of county court judgements rose by 17.5% in the first quarter of this year compared to last, data suggests.

zh.title: "我不想打开的信件":债务诉讼案件增加
zh.summary: 郡县法院无偿债务判决同比增长17.5%，与去年同期相比，反映消费者面临的经济压力加重。增长反映了影响家庭财务的更广泛经济压力。这一趋势突显了消费者破产问题日益加剧。

title: Apple revenue guidance tops estimates on booming iPhone, Mac demand
summary: Apple's revenue guidance exceeded analyst expectations driven by strong demand for iPhones and Macs, with total revenue growth reaching 17%. The forecast beat despite iPhone unit sales coming in below expectations, suggesting price increases or mix-shift toward higher-margin products. The guidance signals continued consumer demand for Apple products.
content: Apple reported 17% revenue growth, topping estimates, even as iPhone sales came up short.

zh.title: 苹果收入指引超预期，iPhone和Mac需求激增
zh.summary: 苹果的收入指引超过分析师预期，由iPhone和Mac的强劲需求驱动，总收入增长达到17%。尽管iPhone单位销售未达预期，但预测仍超预期，这暗示价格提高或向高利润率产品的转变。该指引表明消费者对苹果产品的需求持续强劲。

title: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
summary: Apple reported extraordinary iPhone demand even as CEO Tim Cook prepares to step down after 15 years leading the company. Cook will hand leadership to John Ternus as the company enters a new era. The transition occurs during a period of strong product demand.
content: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.

zh.title: 苹果称iPhone需求"非凡"，老板蒂姆·库克即将卸任
zh.summary: 苹果报告了非凡的iPhone需求，同时首席执行官蒂姆·库克准备在领导公司15年后卸任。库克将领导权交给约翰·特努斯，公司进入新时代。这次过渡发生在产品需求强劲的时期。

title: Dow rallies 700 points, S&P 500 hits new high as strong Alphabet, Caterpillar earnings overshadow Iran worries: Live updates
summary: The stock market rallied with the Dow gaining 700 points and S&P 500 reaching a new high, driven by strong earnings from Alphabet, Caterpillar and other Magnificent Seven companies despite geopolitical tensions. This reflects investor confidence in corporate earnings despite external risks.
content: Investors digested the latest quarterly reports from Amazon, Alphabet and other Magnificent Seven giants.

zh.title: 道指上涨700点，标普500创新高，强劲财报掩盖伊朗担忧：实时更新
zh.summary: 股市反弹，道指上涨700点，标普500指数创新高，由Alphabet、卡特彼勒和其他"七大科技股"的强劲财报推动，尽管存在地缘政治紧张局势。这反映了投资者对企业盈利的信心，尽管存在外部风险。

title: OpenAI trial live updates: Head of Musk's family office takes the stand
summary: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, Sam Altman, and Greg Brockman continues in court with testimony from Musk's family office leadership. The case centers on Musk's claims that OpenAI violated its original nonprofit mission.
content: Elon Musk sued OpenAI, Sam Altman and Greg Brockman in 2024, claiming they reneged on their promise to keep the artificial intelligence lab a nonprofit.

zh.title: OpenAI庭审实时更新：马斯克家族办公室负责人出庭作证
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克对OpenAI、萨姆·奥特曼和格雷格·布罗克曼提起的诉讼继续在法庭进行，马斯克家族办公室领导人出庭作证。该案例的焦点是马斯克声称OpenAI违反了其原始非营利使命。

title: Google cloud growth tops Microsoft and Amazon as all three beat estimates on AI demand
summary: Amazon, Google, and Microsoft reported stronger-than-expected Q1 cloud results, with Google's growth outpacing competitors and signaling accelerating demand for AI services. All three tech giants exceeded analyst estimates across their cloud divisions.
content: Amazon, Google and Microsoft all reported better-than-expected first-quarter cloud results, signaling an acceleration of AI demand

zh.title: 谷歌云增长超微软和亚马逊，三家都因AI需求超预期
zh.summary: 亚马逊、谷歌和微软公布了第一季度云业务结果强于预期，谷歌的增长超过竞争对手，表明对AI服务的需求在加速。三家科技巨头在云业务部门都超过了分析师预期。

title: Cardinal Health is getting pummeled on mixed results — here's our plan for stock
summary: Cardinal Health stock is under pressure following mixed quarterly results that disappointed investors. The analyst team shares their strategic approach to the stock following the disappointing quarter.
content: We wish we hadn't initiated the stock ahead of the quarter, in early March, but hindsight is 20/20.

zh.title: Cardinal Health因混合业绩遭重击——以下是我们对该股票的计划
zh.summary: Cardinal Health股票因令投资者失望的混合季度业绩而承压。分析师团队分享了他们在这个令人失望的季度后对该股票的战略应对方案。

title: Amex Gold adds new benefits for 60th anniversary: Rental car status, additional dining partners and more
summary: American Express expanded its Gold Card benefits for its 60th anniversary, adding new perks including rental car status upgrades and additional dining program partners. These enhancements aim to increase the card's value proposition for premium customers.
content: Learn about the Amex Gold Card's new benefits and limited-time offers to commemorate its 60th anniversary.

zh.title: 美国运通黄金卡60周年推出新福利：租车优先权、更多用餐合作伙伴等
zh.summary: 美国运通在黄金卡60周年之际扩展了福利，新增包括租车升级和额外用餐计划合作伙伴等权益。这些增强旨在提高该卡对高端客户的价值吸引力。

title: Social Security credit for being a mom? It’s a new idea before Congress.
summary: A new legislative proposal would grant Social Security credits for caregiving responsibilities such as raising children or caring for aging parents. The bill aims to address gaps in retirement security for caregivers who may have limited work history.
content: A new bill would give you Social Security credit for looking after your children or your aging parents.

zh.title: 当妈妈也能获得社保积分？这是国会正在审议的新提议
zh.summary: 一项新的立法提案将为照顾责任（如养育孩子或照顾年迈父母）提供社保积分。该法案旨在解决工作历史有限的照顾者的退休保障缺口。

title: Trump taps Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after pulling Casey Means nomination
summary: President Trump withdrew Casey Means' nomination for surgeon general and tapped Nicole Saphier for the role, following Senate opposition over Means' controversial positions on vaccines, birth control, and other health issues. The move signals a shift in the administration's health leadership direction.
content: Means' nomination had stalled in the Senate over concerns about her controversial stances on vaccines, birth control, pesticides and psychedelics.

zh.title: 特朗普在撤回凯西·米恩斯提名后任命尼可·萨菲尔为卫生部长
zh.summary: 特朗普总统撤回了凯西·米恩斯对卫生部长一职的提名，并任命尼可·萨菲尔担任该职位。此举源于参议院反对米恩斯在疫苗、避孕药和其他卫生问题上的争议立场，表明了政府卫生领导方向的转变。

title: ‘The numbers don’t lie’: If I had invested my Social Security in the S&P 500 I’d have $4 million. Is the system broken?
summary: A commentary piece examines how investing Social Security contributions in the S&P 500 would have generated substantially greater retirement savings, raising questions about the adequacy of the current system. The analysis highlights disparities in retirement security between market-based and traditional Social Security approaches.
content: “I do better than many citizens because I’ve contributed at the highest level.”

zh.title: "数字不会说谎"：若我将社会保障投入标普500指数将有400万美元。系统是否破裂？
zh.summary: 评论文章探讨了将社会保障缴款投资于标普500指数将产生更多退休储蓄的情况，引发了对现有制度充分性的质疑。该分析强调了基于市场和传统社会保障方式之间的退休安全差异。

title: DHS shutdown set to end after House passes bill to fund most of agency, including TSA
summary: The House passed a Department of Homeland Security funding bill previously approved by the Senate, ending shutdown threats and ensuring continued operations for TSA and other DHS agencies. The bipartisan measure resolves a budget impasse that threatened critical security operations.
content: The House on Thursday passed a Department of Homeland Security funding bill that the Senate had approved more than a month ago.

zh.title: 众议院通过资助国土安全部大部分机构的法案后，国土安全部关闭将结束
zh.summary: 众议院通过了一项此前获参议院批准的国土安全部资金法案，结束了关闭威胁，确保TSA和其他国土安全部机构继续运作。这项两党措施解决了威胁关键安全运作的预算僵局。

title: Trump to sign executive order expanding retirement account access for workers
summary: President Trump will issue an executive order to expand access to retirement savings accounts and integrate them with the Saver's Match program. The measure aims to increase retirement security and participation among American workers.
content: The president's executive order will expand retirement account access for workers and will be integrated with the Saver's Match.

zh.title: 特朗普签署行政令扩大工人退休账户使用权
zh.summary: 总统特朗普将签署行政令，扩大对退休储蓄账户的使用权，并将其与存钱人匹配计划整合。该措施旨在提高美国工人的退休保障和参与度。

title: S&P 500 pushes to new highs. Here is the ‘line in the sand’ for this bull run.
summary: The S&P 500 continues to climb to record levels, with market analysts identifying the 7,000 level as a critical threshold that could determine the sustainability of the current bull market. Breaching or failing at this level could signal the direction of the broader rally.
content: Why 7,000 is the ‘make-or-break’ level for the current rally.

zh.title: 标普500指数创新高。这是这波牛市的"底线"。
zh.summary: 标普500指数持续创新高，市场分析师将7000点位确定为关键阈值，这可能决定当前牛市的可持续性。突破或未能突破这一水平可能会预示更广泛反弹的方向。

title: U.S. senators ban themselves from prediction markets trading
summary: U.S. senators voted to prohibit themselves from trading in prediction markets on elections, conflicts, and military actions, following calls from Democratic lawmakers to restrict such activity. The move addresses concerns about potential conflicts of interest and insider trading in event contracts.
content: The move came after Democratic lawmakers asked the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to prohibits event contracts on elections, war and military actions.

zh.title: 美国参议员禁止自己在预测市场上交易
zh.summary: 美国参议员投票禁止自己在选举、冲突和军事行动的预测市场上交易，此举是应民主党议员的要求。此举旨在解决对事件合约中潜在利益冲突和内幕交易的担忧。

title: Apple execs to talk China and tariffs, but will avoid discussing foldable iPhone, per traders on Kalshi
summary: Apple is set to report quarterly earnings with executives expected to address China operations and tariff impacts during the earnings call. Traders are anticipating the company's strategic focus on these topics rather than discussions of foldable iPhone development.
content: Apple is set to report earnings after the bell on Thursday, with its conference call scheduled for 5:00 pm ET.

zh.title: 苹果高管将讨论中国和关税，但将避免讨论可折叠iPhone，据Kalshi交易员称
zh.summary: 苹果将报告季度收益，预计高管在财报电话会议中解决中国业务和关税影响问题。交易员预期该公司将战略性地关注这些议题，而非可折叠iPhone开发的讨论。

title: These 3 companies are keeping the lights on for AI’s energy needs — and they’re cashing in
summary: Three companies are profiting from providing the critical energy infrastructure that powers artificial intelligence, capturing significant revenue as AI demand surges. While AI application companies garner headlines, infrastructure providers are capturing substantial financial gains from the AI boom.
content: The headlines focus on apps, but the big money is flowing to agentic AI’s boring industrial backbone.

zh.title: 这3家公司正为AI的能源需求保持供电——他们正在大赚
zh.summary: 三家公司通过提供驱动人工智能的关键能源基础设施而获利，随着AI需求激增，获得了可观的收入。虽然AI应用公司获得头条新闻，但基础设施提供商从AI热潮中获得了巨大的财务收益。

title: Trump to get briefed on potential Iran strikes before war hits key 60-day deadline: Reports
summary: President Trump will receive briefings on potential military action against Iran before a critical 60-day deadline as tensions escalate over nuclear negotiations. Iran has refused further talks unless U.S. sanctions are lifted, creating a geopolitical impasse.
content: Iran has rejected further negotiations unless the U.S. blockade is lifted, but President Trump has said he won't do so until Tehran agrees to a nuclear deal.

zh.title: 特朗普将在战争达到关键60天截止期限前接受伊朗潜在打击简报：报告
zh.summary: 特朗普总统将在核谈判紧张局势升级前接受有关对伊朗潜在军事行动的简报，截止期限为60天。伊朗拒绝进一步谈判，除非美国解除制裁，造成地缘政治僵局。

title: Lawyers to the wealthy warn that AI legal advice comes with serious risks
summary: Using AI tools like ChatGPT for legal advice on matters such as inheritance and prenups poses serious risks, as such guidance could be used against clients in court, according to legal experts. Wealthy individuals increasingly turn to AI for quick guidance, but doing so could jeopardize their legal positions.
content: Asking ChatGPT how to divide your fortune or design a prenup can be used against you in court, lawyers say.

zh.title: 律师向富人警告人工智能法律建议存在严重风险
zh.summary: 根据法律专家的说法，使用ChatGPT等AI工具进行法律咨询（涉及继承和婚前协议等问题）存在严重风险，因为这样的建议可能在法庭上被用来对付客户。越来越多的富人转向AI寻求快速指导，但这样做可能会危害他们的法律地位。

title: European Central Bank keeps rates on hold in the face of inflation threat
summary: The European Central Bank held interest rates steady amid persistent inflation concerns, maintaining its cautious monetary policy stance. This decision reflects the bank's wait-and-see approach to managing economic risks during uncertain times.

zh.title: 欧洲央行在通胀威胁下保持利率不变
zh.summary: 欧洲央行在持续的通胀压力面前保持利率不变，维持了其谨慎的货币政策立场。这一决定反映了银行在不确定时期管理经济风险的观望态度。

title: Core inflation rate hit 3.2% in March, as expected; GDP grew 2% in first quarter
summary: Core inflation remained steady at 3.2% in March while first-quarter GDP grew 2%, indicating moderate economic expansion alongside persistent inflationary pressures. The figures suggest the economy is growing at a measured pace even as price increases remain a concern.

zh.title: 三月核心通胀率达3.2%（符合预期），第一季度GDP增长2%
zh.summary: 三月份核心通胀率保持在3.2%，第一季度GDP增长2%，表明经济温和扩张，同时通胀压力依然存在。这些数据表明，即使物价上升仍是一个关注点，经济也在以稳定的速度增长。

title: Scammers are targeting student-loan borrowers trying to make payments. Do this to protect yourself.
summary: Scammers are exploiting confusion among student-loan borrowers dealing with recent program changes by targeting them as they attempt to make payments. Borrowers must take protective steps as fraudsters capitalize on uncertainty surrounding loan repayment rules.
content: Borrowers have been contending with major changes to the program in recent years, and scammers are capitalizing on their confusion.

zh.title: 诈骗者正在针对试图还款的学生贷款借款人。采取这些措施来保护自己。
zh.summary: 诈骗者正在利用学生贷款借款人因最近项目变化而产生的困惑，针对他们进行诈骗。借款人必须采取防护措施，因为诈骗分子利用贷款还款规则的不确定性进行诈骗。

title: Trump said his blockade would cause Iran's oil industry to 'explode' this week. Why that won't happen
summary: Despite claims that a blockade would severely damage Iran's oil industry, analysts suggest such an outcome is unlikely given the current stalemate between the U.S. and Iran. The standoff is likely to persist unless one side accepts the economic consequences and changes course.
content: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear.

zh.title: 特朗普说他的封锁本周会导致伊朗石油工业"爆炸"。为什么这不会发生
zh.summary: 尽管有人声称封锁会严重损害伊朗石油工业，但分析师认为这样的结果不太可能，因为美国和伊朗之间目前处于僵持状态。除非一方接受经济后果并改变路线，否则这种僵局可能会持续。

title: South Korean stocks just enjoyed their second-best month ever — and now the market is bigger than the U.K.
summary: South Korea's stock market has surged to become larger than the U.K.'s, driven primarily by booming demand for high-end memory chips used in AI applications. This reflects the country's significant exposure to the semiconductor sector's growth from artificial intelligence infrastructure expansion.
content: The primary factors behind the strength of the Korean market is the boom in the market for high-end memory chips used by AI developers

zh.title: 韩国股市刚刚经历了历史上第二好的月份——现在市场规模超过了英国
zh.summary: 韩国股市急剧上升，现已超过英国的市场规模，主要得益于对用于人工智能应用的高端内存芯片的巨大需求。这反映了韩国在半导体行业中因人工智能基础设施扩张而获得的重大增长机遇。

title: Merck beats quarterly estimates on strength of Keytruda and new products, narrows outlook
summary: Merck exceeded quarterly earnings expectations, driven by strong performance from its cancer drug Keytruda and new product offerings, though it narrowed its full-year sales guidance while raising profit expectations. The mixed guidance signals confidence in profitability despite sales headwinds.
content: Merck narrowed its 2026 sales guidance and hiked its adjusted profit outlook.

zh.title: 默克因凯特鲁达及新产品表现强劲击败季度预期，调整全年展望
zh.summary: 默克超越季度盈利预期，得益于抗癌药物凯特鲁达和新产品的强劲表现，但调整了全年销售指导预期，同时上调利润预期。这一混合信号表明尽管销售面临逆风，但公司对盈利能力充满信心。

title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, Alphabet, Palantir, AbbVie & more
summary: Major Wall Street analysts issued significant recommendations on high-profile technology and healthcare stocks including Nvidia, Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, Alphabet, and Palantir. These analyst calls provide guidance for investors navigating major companies' stock performance and investment potential.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Thursday.

zh.title: 周四分析师最重要评级：英伟达、亚马逊、微软、Meta、字母表、Palantir、艾比维等
zh.summary: 华尔街主要分析师对英伟达、亚马逊、微软、Meta、字母表和Palantir等高知名度科技和医疗股票发布了重要建议。这些分析师评级为投资者提供指导，帮助他们了解主要公司的股票表现和投资潜力。

title: Forget buy the dip. Now retail investors are ‘trading the mania’ in chip stocks, and it’s about to get messy.
summary: Retail investors are increasingly chasing semiconductor stocks during a period of high volatility, according to Goldman Sachs traders, departing from traditional "buy the dip" strategies. These aggressive positions could become difficult to unwind if the semiconductor sector experiences a downturn.
content: Goldman Sachs’ traders say investors have been chasing the hot semiconductor sector, but with some high-stakes bets that may be hard to get out of should things go wrong.

zh.title: 忘掉逢低吸纳。现在散户投资者在芯片股中"顺势交易"，混乱即将来临
zh.summary: 根据高盛交易员的说法，散户投资者在高波动性时期越来越多地追逐半导体股票，偏离了传统的"逢低吸纳"策略。如果半导体板块经历下行，这些激进头寸将难以平仓。

title: Caterpillar forecasts higher annual revenue as power equipment benefits from AI buildout
summary: Caterpillar increased its full-year revenue outlook after beating quarterly profit expectations, capitalizing on strong demand for power equipment needed in AI infrastructure development. The boost reflects broader corporate spending on AI buildout and data center expansion.
content: Caterpillar raised its annual revenue forecast after beating quarterly profit expectations, as it benefited from an AI ⁠infrastructure boom.

zh.title: 卡特彼勒预测年度收入将增加，因电力设备从AI基础设施建设中受益
zh.summary: 卡特彼勒在击败季度利润预期后提高了全年收入前景，利用对AI基础设施开发中所需电力设备的强劲需求。这一提升反映了更广泛的企业在AI建设和数据中心扩展上的支出。

title: Why the 60/40 portfolio is crushing it — despite market chaos and inflation fears
summary: The traditional 60/40 stock-to-bond portfolio allocation is performing strongly despite market turbulence and inflation concerns, suggesting that diversified strategies work well during periods of economic uncertainty. The strategy's resilience highlights the enduring value of balanced investing.
content: This time-tested mix of stocks and bonds thrives in uncertainty — and maybe because of it.

zh.title: 为什么60/40投资组合表现出色——尽管市场混乱和通胀担忧
zh.summary: 传统的60/40股票债券投资组合配置尽管面临市场波动和通胀担忧，但表现强劲，表明多元化策略在经济不确定时期表现良好。该策略的韧性突出了平衡投资的持久价值。

title: Bank of England keeps rates on hold at 3.75% as Iran war shakes outlook
summary: The Bank of England maintained its interest rate at 3.75% despite geopolitical tensions related to the Iran situation that could affect the economic outlook. The decision reflects the central bank's cautious stance amid external risks to the economy.
content: The Bank of England voted to keep its key interest rate on hold at 3.75% on Thursday

zh.title: 英国央行维持利率在3.75%不变，因伊朗战争动摇前景
zh.summary: 英国央行尽管面临可能影响经济前景的伊朗局势相关地缘政治紧张局势，但维持利率在3.75%不变。这一决定反映了央行在经济外部风险中的谨慎立场。

title: Will I get my deposit back on my rental if I make minor renovations — and paint the walls a different color?
summary: Tenants considering renovations or repainting a rental apartment should understand how such changes could affect their security deposit claims, as landlords may view alterations negatively. Local tenant laws and landlord policies vary significantly and should be reviewed before making any modifications.
content: “Why not just make my rental my project? Is this a bad idea”

zh.title: 如果我进行小规模装修并将墙壁粉刷成不同的颜色，我能拿回租赁押金吗？
zh.summary: 考虑装修或重新粉刷租赁公寓的租户应该了解此类更改可能如何影响其安全押金索赔，因为房东可能会对改动持负面看法。当地租户法律和房东政策差异很大，在进行任何修改之前应该进行审查。

title: Eli Lilly blows past quarterly estimates, hikes outlook as Zepbound and Mounjaro sales skyrocket
summary: Eli Lilly significantly exceeded quarterly earnings expectations and raised its full-year sales guidance by $2 billion, driven by soaring sales of its weight-loss and diabetes drugs Zepbound and Mounjaro. The strong performance reflects surging demand for GLP-1 medications in the booming obesity treatment market.
content: Lilly hiked its full-year sales outlook by $2 billion, and also raised its adjusted profit guidance.

zh.title: 随着Zepbound和Mounjaro销售飙升，礼来大幅超过季度预期，提高全年展望
zh.summary: 礼来公司大幅超过季度收益预期，并将全年销售指导提高了20亿美元，由其减肥和糖尿病药物Zepbound和Mounjaro的销售飙升推动。强劲的业绩反映了蓬勃发展的肥胖症治疗市场中对GLP-1药物的需求激增。

title: ‘I am her scapegoat’: My mother-in-law squandered all her money. Do we buy her a house so she’s not homeless?
summary: The question of whether to provide financial assistance to a parent-in-law facing homelessness due to poor financial decisions raises important issues about family obligation versus personal financial boundaries. The situation is complicated by strained family relationships and differing perspectives on financial responsibility.
content: “She blames me for her poor relationship with her son and grandchildren.”

zh.title: "我是她的替罪羊"：我的婆婆挥霍了所有的钱。我们买房子给她以防止她无家可归吗？
zh.summary: 是否向因财务决策不善而面临无家可归的公婆提供财务援助的问题引发了关于家庭义务与个人财务界限的重要问题。这种情况因家庭关系紧张和对财务责任的不同观点而变得复杂。

title: Oil jumps to highest price since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
summary: Oil prices surged to their highest levels since 2022 following reports that the Trump administration is considering military strikes against Iran. The escalation reflects growing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and their direct impact on energy markets.
content: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

zh.title: 伊朗局势升级，石油价格跳升至2022年以来最高水平
zh.summary: 在美国特朗普政府考虑对伊朗采取军事打击的报道传出后，油价飙升至2022年以来的最高水平。这次升级反映了中东地缘政治紧张局势加剧，对能源市场产生直接影响。

title: Volkswagen posts 14% drop in first-quarter profit on tariff pressure, China competition
summary: Volkswagen's first-quarter profits fell 14% as the automaker faces dual headwinds from rising tariffs and intensifying competition in China. The decline underscores broader challenges facing European car manufacturers navigating trade and market pressures.
content: The results come as top European original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) navigate several industry headwinds.

zh.title: 大众汽车第一季度利润下降14%，面临关税压力和中国竞争
zh.summary: 大众汽车第一季度利润下降14%，该公司面临关税上升和中国竞争加剧的双重压力。这一下降突显了欧洲汽车制造商在应对贸易和市场压力中面临的更广泛挑战。

title: Jeep maker Stellantis beats expectations as first-quarter operating income tops $1 billion
summary: Jeep maker Stellantis reported first-quarter operating income of $1.19 billion, comfortably exceeding analyst expectations. The strong earnings demonstrate resilience despite sector-wide industry headwinds.
content: The multinational conglomerate posted first-quarter adjusted operating income of 960 million euros ($1.19 billion), comfortably beating analyst expectations.

zh.title: 吉普车制造商Stellantis超出预期，第一季度营业收入超过10亿美元
zh.summary: 吉普车制造商Stellantis公布第一季度营业收入达11.9亿美元，远超分析师预期。这些强劲的收益表明，尽管整个行业面临逆风，但该公司仍具有韧性。

title: Israel’s economy and financial markets are booming — even as conflict rages in the Middle East
summary: Israel's economy and financial markets are significantly outperforming developed-market peers, including the United States, even amid ongoing Middle East conflict. The economic strength highlights the decoupling between geopolitical instability and financial market performance.
content: The Israeli economy is massively outperforming a swathe of developed-market peers, including key ally the United States.

zh.title: 以色列经济和金融市场蓬勃发展——尽管中东冲突继续肆虐
zh.summary: 以色列的经济和金融市场大幅超越发达市场同行（包括美国），尽管中东冲突仍在继续。这种经济强势突出了地缘政治不稳定性与金融市场表现之间的脱钩现象。

title: SoftBank reportedly weighs $100 billion valuation for new AI and robotics spinout in potential U.S. IPO
summary: SoftBank is planning to create and list a standalone AI and robotics company valued at $100 billion, potentially through a U.S. IPO. The spinout, tentatively named "Roze," reflects major investor confidence in AI and robotics sectors.
content: SoftBank Group is planning to create and list a standalone artificial intelligence and robotics company, coined "Roze" in the U.S.

zh.title: 软银据报考虑为新的人工智能和机器人业务独立上市公司估值1000亿美元，可能通过美国IPO进行
zh.summary: 软银计划创建并上市一家独立的人工智能和机器人公司，估值1000亿美元，可能通过美国IPO进行。这项拆分暂定名为"Roze"，反映了投资者对人工智能和机器人行业的重大信心。

title: European markets set for lower open as oil prices surge; ECB and BOE decisions ahead
summary: European stock markets are set to open lower as surging oil prices weigh on investor sentiment, while major central bank decisions from the ECB and BOE loom. The market movement reflects combined concerns about energy costs and monetary policy.
content: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Thursday as investors assess soaring oil prices and await more earnings and central bank moves.

zh.title: 随着油价飙升，欧洲市场准备低开；欧洲央行和英国央行决议即将公布
zh.summary: 欧洲股市准备低开，因为油价飙升影响投资者情绪，同时欧洲央行和英国央行的重大决议即将公布。这种市场走势反映了人们对能源成本和货币政策的综合担忧。

title: Food bank stocks 'low as client numbers increase'
summary: Food banks in Guernsey are experiencing depleted stocks as demand from clients continues to rise. The shortfall signals growing economic hardship and potential need for expanded social support.
content: Guernsey Welfare Service says demand has grown and it could increase further.

zh.title: 食物银行库存在客户数量增加时面临短缺
zh.summary: 根西岛的食物银行正在经历库存枯竭，因为客户需求持续增加。短缺表明经济困难加剧，可能需要扩大社会支持。

title: Homeowners turn to solar panels as oil prices rise
summary: Rising oil prices are driving a surge in residential solar panel installations, with Yorkshire installers reporting tenfold increases in customer interest since the Iran conflict escalated. The shift reflects households seeking alternatives to rising energy costs.
content: Yorkshire installers report up to a tenfold increase in interest since the start of the Iran war.

zh.title: 房主因油价上升而转向太阳能电池板
zh.summary: 油价上升推动了住宅太阳能电池板安装的激增，约克郡安装商报告自伊朗冲突升级以来客户兴趣增加了十倍。这一转变反映了家庭在能源成本上升的情况下寻求替代能源。

title: Nvidia just invested in the AI legal startup that's splashing Jude Law ads everywhere
summary: Nvidia has invested in Swedish legal tech startup Legora, which has raised $800 million and now carries a $5.6 billion valuation. The investment underscores Nvidia's expansion beyond chips into AI-powered legal solutions.
content: Swedish startup Legora has raised more than $800 million in the past 12 months, and the latest deal values it at $5.6 billion.

zh.title: 英伟达投资大量投放朱德·洛广告的AI法律初创公司
zh.summary: 英伟达已投资瑞典法律科技初创公司Legora，该公司已融资8亿美元，估值达56亿美元。这项投资凸显了英伟达在超越芯片、扩展到AI驱动的法律解决方案方面的战略。

title: U.S. House approves outline for $70 billion more for immigration enforcement
summary: The U.S. House of Representatives approved $70 billion in additional funding for immigration enforcement without any Democratic support. The partisan vote reflects deepening divisions over immigration policy priorities.
content: The U.S. House of Representatives approved an additional $70 billion for immigration enforcement activities, despite no democrat support on Wednesday.

zh.title: 美国众议院批准额外70亿美元用于移民执法的框架
zh.summary: 美国众议院批准了额外70亿美元的移民执法资金，没有获得任何民主党的支持。这次跨党派投票反映了移民政策优先事项上的加深分歧。

title: Amazon earnings beat expectations with strong cloud growth
summary: Amazon exceeded earnings expectations with cloud computing revenue growing 28% year-over-year, significantly outpacing analyst forecasts. The strong cloud performance continues to be a major earnings driver for the company.
content: Revenue in Amazon's cloud computing segment expanded 28% year over year, topping analysts' estimates.

zh.title: 亚马逊云计算强劲增长，收益超预期
zh.summary: 亚马逊超出了收益预期，云计算收入同比增长28%，大幅超过分析师预测。强劲的云计算表现继续是该公司的主要收益驱动力。

title: China factory activity tops expectations in April — but growth slows as new orders soften
summary: China's manufacturing activity exceeded expectations in April with a purchasing managers' index of 50.3, though growth is slowing as new orders soften. The mixed signals suggest economic momentum is moderating despite near-term strength.
content: The official purchasing managers' index reading of 50.3 was higher than the the 50.1 expected by Reuters-polled economists.

zh.title: 中国4月工厂活动超预期——但新订单疲软导致增长放缓
zh.summary: 中国4月制造业活动超出预期，采购经理指数达到50.3，但由于新订单疲软，增长正在放缓。这些混合信号表明，尽管短期内强劲，但经济动力正在缓和。

title: Alphabet ups 2026 capex to as much as $190 billion, expects to 'significantly increase' in 2027
summary: Alphabet raised its 2026 capital expenditure budget to $190 billion and signaled further significant increases in 2027, driven by AI and cloud infrastructure investments. The unprecedented spending reflects the company's commitment to maintaining dominance in AI.
content: Alphabet reported first-quarter earnings, posting booming cloud revenue and upping its full-year capex spend to as much as $190 billion.

zh.title: Alphabet将2026年资本支出提高至190亿美元，预计2027年将显著增加
zh.summary: Alphabet将其2026年资本支出预算提高至190亿美元，并暗示2027年将进一步大幅增加，这是由AI和云基础设施投资驱动的。这种前所未有的支出反映了该公司保持AI领导地位的承诺。

title: These workers are allowed to save $35,000 a year in their 401(k)s. Here’s how many actually do it.
summary: Few workers maximize their 401(k) catch-up contributions of $35,000 annually despite eligibility, with most citing insufficient discretionary income. The gap between allowed and actual savings highlights wealth inequality and retirement security challenges.
content: Super catch-up contribution rates are low: “Most people don’t have that kind of discretionary income.”

zh.title: 这些员工被允许每年在401(k)中储蓄35,000美元。实际有多少人这样做？
zh.summary: 尽管符合资格条件，但很少有员工最大化其每年35,000美元的401(k)追缴供款，大多数人表示可支配收入不足。允许储蓄额与实际储蓄之间的差距突显了财富不平等和退休保障挑战。

title: More diners are eating at Chipotle despite higher prices, bucking Wall Street’s concerns about restaurants
summary: Chipotle beat Wall Street expectations with a same-store sales surprise in the first quarter despite higher menu prices, sending shares up 6.2%. The results defy broader market concerns about restaurants' ability to sustain pricing amid inflation.
content: Shares of Chipotle jumped 6.2% after hours on Wednesday, after the company managed to eke out a surprise same-store sales gain for the first quarter.

zh.title: 尽管菜单价格上升，更多食客前往Chipotle就餐，与华尔街对餐厅业的担忧相悖
zh.summary: Chipotle尽管菜单价格更高，但在第一季度超越华尔街预期，实现同店销售惊人表现，股价上涨6.2%。这一结果与市场担忧相悖，即餐厅在通胀中维持定价的能力。

title: Oil extends gains with Brent at $120 as fears of an extended U.S.-Iran conflict rise
summary: Oil prices rose to $120 per barrel amid expectations of prolonged U.S. sanctions on Iranian exports and stalled nuclear negotiations. The geopolitical tensions and potential supply constraints are driving energy market volatility, affecting global inflation and energy costs worldwide.
content: Oil extended gains on Thursday as signs of a prolonged U.S. blockade on Iranian exports and stalled nuclear negotiations.

zh.title: 布伦特油价升至120美元，美伊冲突延长担忧加剧
zh.summary: 随着美国对伊朗出口长期制裁预期和核谈判陷入僵局，油价升至每桶120美元。地缘政治紧张局势和潜在的供应约束正在推动能源市场波动，影响全球通胀和能源成本。

title: Why Alphabet’s stock is the standout gainer on Big Tech’s monster earnings day
summary: Alphabet's strong earnings beat and robust cloud business growth outpaced competitors and justify the company's increased spending projections. The company's cloud acceleration stands out during a period of heavy Big Tech earnings reports, demonstrating its competitive positioning in AI infrastructure investment.
content: Alphabet’s earnings beat and strong cloud growth are helping to justify raised spending projections.

zh.title: 为什么在科技巨头创纪录的财报日，Alphabet股票是最大赢家
zh.summary: Alphabet强劲的财报表现和云业务的稳健增长超过竞争对手，证明公司增加支出预期的合理性。在科技巨头密集财报期间，该公司的云业务加速增长脱颖而出，展示了其在人工智能基础设施投资中的竞争地位。

title: Ford’s profit jumps as carmaker powers through an EV slowdown
summary: Ford reported significant profit growth despite EV market headwinds, bolstered by a substantial tariff refund and raised full-year outlook. The earnings demonstrate the company's ability to navigate industry transitions while managing regulatory benefits effectively.
content: Ford gets hefty tariff refund and raises outlook for the year.

zh.title: 福特利润激增，汽车制造商克服电动车销售放缓
zh.summary: 尽管面临电动汽车市场逆风，福特报告了显著的利润增长，受益于一笔巨大的关税退款和上调的全年展望。这些财报结果展示了公司在应对行业转型同时有效管理监管补益的能力。

title: Why Qualcomm’s stock is soaring even in the face of a weak outlook
summary: Qualcomm's stock is gaining despite weak near-term guidance as investors focus on potential AI opportunities in future quarters. The market is pricing in optimistic long-term AI growth prospects, reflecting confidence in the company's emerging business opportunities.
content: Investors are looking beyond the current quarter at hints of meaningful AI opportunity ahead.

zh.title: 为什么高通股价在前景黯淡的情况下仍在飙升
zh.summary: 尽管近期指引疲软，但由于投资者关注未来几个季度的潜在人工智能机会，高通股价仍在上涨。市场正在计入乐观的长期人工智能增长前景，反映了对公司新兴商业机会的信心。

title: Samsung profit surges over eight-fold to beat estimates as AI boom fuels memory chip crunch
summary: Samsung Electronics reported an eight-fold surge in first-quarter operating profits, beating analyst expectations due to surging memory chip demand from the AI boom. The record performance reflects intense competition for semiconductor capacity as AI adoption accelerates globally.
content: Samsung Electronics reported an over eight-fold increase in first-quarter operating profits, hitting a new record and beating analysts' estimates.

zh.title: 三星利润飙升八倍以上超过预期，人工智能热潮导致内存芯片短缺
zh.summary: 由于人工智能热潮推动内存芯片需求激增，三星电子报告第一季度运营利润激增八倍，超过分析师预期。这一创纪录的表现反映了随着人工智能在全球加速采用，半导体产能竞争激烈。
